records.object: 000 precise samples were analyzed to target and eradicate positive cases. Each monitor has his equipment with a GPS, a diaphorin aspirator, storage tubes for insects and nymphs, and 70% alcohol. The nymph is of varied coloration that goes from yellow, orange to brown, with a flattened ovoid body with red eyes and black antennae and developing wings; It grows in five stages and measures from 0.25 to 1.7 millimeters in its last phase.
